rules.rule: Model classes must be named in the singular with no type suffix (Student, not StudentModel).
Service classes must be named in the singular with the Service suffix (StudentService, not StudentsService or StudentBL).
Broker classes must be named in the singular with the Broker suffix (StudentBroker, not StudentsBroker).
Controller classes must be named in the plural with the Controller suffix (StudentsController, not StudentController).
Class fields must be named in camelCase (studentName, not StudentName or _studentName).
Private class fields must be referenced using the this. keyword.
When passing literal values to a constructor, named aliases must be used.
Property assignment in object initializer syntax must follow the same order as class property declarations.
Must not use target-typed new (Student student = new (...)). Use var student = new Student(...) when type is clear.
